tagline: From our land to your cup.

hero.title: Coffee with purpose, from our land to your table.
hero.subtitle: A simple showcase of microlots, memberships, and essentials. When you're ready, we take your order on WhatsApp.
hero.photo_credit: Main photo — public file from the desnudocoffee.com Shopify CDN.

price.approx_hint: Indicative price — confirm when you order on WhatsApp.

cart.title: Your selection
cart.subtitle: No checkout here — we finalize everything on WhatsApp.
cart.empty: Tap “Add” on any item to build an inquiry.
cart.configure_phone: Set VITE_WHATSAPP_PHONE in your environment to enable WhatsApp links.

whatsapp.intro: Hello DE MI TIERRA — I'd like to inquire about:

locations.body: Hours, shipping, and locations — we'll confirm the details with you on WhatsApp.

coffee_community_lot.name: Community microlot · Colombia origin
coffee_community_lot.summary: A communal selection from the region. The photo shows dried natural-process cherries on the farm — aligned with traceable community lots.

coffee_colombia_miel.name: Colombia · Red Honey · Castillo · 500 g
coffee_colombia_miel.summary: Per DE MI TIERRA bag: Red Honey process, Castillo variety, whole bean, medium roast; cup score ~87.25.

coffee_gesha_washed.name: Gesha · Gentle wash · 500 g
coffee_gesha_washed.summary: Front of bag: Gesha, Gentle Wash, whole bean, medium roast; score ~87. Coffee from Colombia.

coffee_java_honey.name: Castillo · Gentle wash · 125 g
coffee_java_honey.summary: Green bag: Castillo, Gentle Wash, 125 g, whole bean, medium roast; score ~85.75. Colombia origin.

coffee_java_wild_natural.name: Natural · Castillo · 500 g
coffee_java_wild_natural.summary: Blue bag: Natural process, Castillo, 500 g, whole bean, medium roast; score ~85.75. Coffee from Colombia.

coffee_caramel_apple_java.name: Premium Single Origin · medium roast
coffee_caramel_apple_java.summary: Green Jay artwork on the bag: Premium Single Origin, whole bean, medium roast. Sweet, fruity line — confirm the exact lot when you order.

coffee_caturra_esperanza.name: Caturra · Gentle wash · 250 g
coffee_caturra_esperanza.summary: Bag: Caturra, gentle wash, 250 g, whole bean, medium roast; score ~87.25. Coffee from Colombia.

coffee_ethiopian_washed.name: Ethiopian Washed
coffee_ethiopian_washed.summary: Cup profile: floral and citrus highland notes. The bag shown is DE MI TIERRA Premium Single Origin (graphic reference); confirm availability on WhatsApp.

coffee_suenios_decaf.name: Sueños DECAF
coffee_suenios_decaf.summary: Full-flavored decaf. The image is the back of the bag (process story, contact +57 310 808 0400); we confirm the decaf SKU when you order.

coffee_high_tea_gesha.name: Gesha · Gentle wash · 250 g
coffee_high_tea_gesha.summary: 250 g bag: Gesha, gentle wash, whole bean, medium roast; score ~87.25. Smaller format in the Gesha line.

coffee_big_bag.name: Large coffee bag (5 lb)
coffee_big_bag.summary: Five pounds of fresh coffee — grind and details are confirmed when you order.

membership_bronze.name: Bronze Membership
membership_bronze.summary: Recurring fresh bags — pick profile and grind; optional heads-up to choose each week's roast.

membership_silver.name: Silver Membership
membership_silver.summary: Step-up tier with better per-bag value — more coffee, same core membership perks.

membership_weekly_sub.name: Weekly subscription — freshly roasted coffee
membership_weekly_sub.summary: Weekly fresh-roast rhythm — selection and logistics we fine-tune with you.

chocolate_70_dark.name: Chocolate bar · 70% dark
chocolate_70_dark.summary: 70% dark bar — deep cocoa, minimal sugar; made to pair with afternoon espresso.

chocolate_50_milk.name: Chocolate bar · 50% milk
chocolate_50_milk.summary: 50% milk chocolate — creamy, crowd-pleasing and easy to share.

merch_tote.name: Tote bag
merch_tote.summary: Sturdy tote for beans, books or market runs — simple, practical design.

merch_tshirt.name: T-shirt
merch_tshirt.summary: Organic cotton pocket tees — soft daily wear with farm-inspired graphics.

merch_egift.name: E-gift card
merch_egift.summary: Digital gift card — amount and delivery are set at checkout.
